## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Scope

- [ ] Focused change (no unrelated edits)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/config changed

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test

## Validation

- [ ] Local checks run (if applicable)
- [ ] CI passes

## Risk & Rollback

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollback plan:

## Data Safety

- [ ] No destructive data change
- [ ] If destructive, migration/backup plan is documented

## Related

Issue/Task/Doc links:
